availability_definition.value: no SLA / uptime not committed; sites provided 'as is, as available' with no uptime commitment
availability_definition.citation: THE COREWEAVE SITES ARE PROVIDED ON AN "AS IS, AS AVAILABLE" BASIS

credit_regime.value: not specified (no service-credit structure in provided documents)

claim_mechanics.value: not specified (no credit claim process in provided documents)

sla_exclusions.value: No SLA present, so no formal SLA exclusions. General liability disclaimer covers force majeure ('events beyond the Company's reasonable control, including acts of God'), DDoS, viruses, interruptions/delays.
sla_exclusions.citation: FAILURE OF PERFORMANCE WHETHER OR NOT CAUSED BY EVENTS BEYOND THE COMPANY'S REASONABLE CONTROL

capacity_reservation.value: not specified in public documents; no reserved-instance/committed-use/take-or-pay terms published (likely negotiated, not published)

data_use_ai_training.value: not specified; no language on using customer data or content to train/improve AI/ML models. Terms reference Privacy Policy (not provided).

suspension_rights.value: May suspend or terminate for AUP violation (even unintentional/unauthorized), in good faith discretion; may also block content/traffic when used unlawfully. Payment problems may suspend/cancel a Transaction. No prior notice required; may act at any time in sole discretion.
suspension_rights.citation: CoreWeave may... suspend or terminate Customer's use of CoreWeave Services

termination.value: Right to withdraw/amend sites and cease access in sole discretion without notice; AUP allows termination of service use on violation. No termination-for-convenience by customer or post-termination data-retrieval window specified.
termination.citation: your right to use the CoreWeave Sites will cease immediately

unilateral_modification.value: Provider may update terms in sole discretion; changes effective immediately upon posting, with continued use constituting agreement. AUP may be modified at any time by posting revised version.
unilateral_modification.citation: All changes are effective immediately when we post them

governing_law_disputes.value: Governing law: New York. Venue: courts in New York, New York. Arbitration: yes, at Company's sole discretion (AAA rules, NY law), binding. Class-action waiver: yes (disputes resolved individually, no class action).
governing_law_disputes.citation: any disputes... to final and binding arbitration... WITHOUT RESORT TO ANY FORM OF CLASS…
